query:
SELECT DISTINCT mesAno, COUNT(*) as qtd 
FROM contasCorrentes 
WHERE mesAno REGEXP '^[0-9]{3,4}/20[0-9]{2}$'
  AND mesAno NOT REGEXP '^[0-1][0-9]/20[0-9]{2}$'
GROUP BY mesAno
ORDER BY mesAno;
